## 1. Testing Issues

## 2. Code Quality Metrics

## 3. Security Issues
For each: Critical/High/Medium, file path, impact, current code, recommendation.

## 4. Models Issues
Fat models, callback complexity, missing validations, Law of Demeter violations.

## 5. Controllers Issues
Fat controllers, business logic in actions, missing strong parameters.

## 6. Code Design Issues
Service objects that should be POROs, feature envy, large classes.

## 7. Views Issues
Logic in views, missing partials.

## 8. External Services Issues
Fire and forget, missing timeouts, bare rescue.

## 9. Database & Performance Issues
Missing indexes, Ruby vs SQL iteration, silent failures, messy migrations.
